verses.1: A Psalm of David. I will give You thanks with all my heart; I will sing Your praises before the gods.
verses.2: I will bow down toward Your holy temple And give thanks to Your name for Your mercy and Your truth; For You have made Your word great according to all Your name.
verses.3: On the day I called, You answered me; You made me bold with strength in my soul.
verses.4: All the kings of the earth will give thanks to You, LORD, When they have heard the words of Your mouth.
verses.5: And they will sing of the ways of the LORD, For great is the glory of the LORD.
verses.6: For the LORD is exalted, Yet He looks after the lowly, But He knows the haughty from afar.
verses.7: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, You will revive me; You will reach out with Your hand against the wrath of my enemies, And Your right hand will save me.
verses.8: The LORD will accomplish what concerns me; Your faithfulness, LORD, is everlasting; Do not abandon the works of Your hands.
